title: iria umbellata
intro: Iria umbellata, also known as the 'Brisbane fern', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Goodeniaceae. It is native to Australia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system. The plant has been used to treat a range of health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, due to its sedative and antispasmodic effects. Herbal preparations of Iria umbellata include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
